memory.summary: I'm tempted to grab some leisure time now since the project isn't due until Thursday, but I need to balance that with my close friends who might want to hang out.

desires: Keep the vibe with cohort_3 electric right now; I can't handle being a buzzkill or missing out on our hangout.
Get that instant dopamine hit from finishing the trivial chore before my brain completely checks out from the sleep debt.
Avoid looking like I'm slacking off to the professor, even though the term project isn't due for three days.

goals.description: Full throttle into the cohort_3 hangout immediately to lock in that electric vibe before I overthink it or get bored.
goals.rationale: Affiliation is my core value (0.5 weight); being a buzzkill or missing out with close friends (cohort_3 trust/closeness: 7/7) is a dealbreaker right now. Impulsive time horizon means I'm prioritizing immediate social payoff over future project progress.

goals.description: Kill the trivial chore instantly just to get that dopamine hit and silence the nagging guilt about looking lazy to the professor.
goals.rationale: Assertiveness drives me to avoid appearing slacking off, but my impulsive nature and high procrastination bias mean I'll do this only as a quick fix after the social event if I still have energy. The 'soft' hardness of the task makes it easy to defer until later without catastrophic failure.

agent.last_reasoning: I'm going to the cohort_3 hangout now. Affiliation is my top priority; I can't risk missing this electric vibe or looking like a buzzkill. The term project has 3 days, so I'll kill that trivial chore later if I have energy.
